race.comment: AUZSTAR (2) last raced five weeks ago when she grabbed a well-deserved win over 1500m at this track, overcoming a check in the straight to win pulling away. Had a tick-over trial on 27 May. Getting up in the weights but can get the job done again. BENAMERA (10) has been hot and cold of late. Scored two back at Canberra then was too bad to be true at the Illawarra Grange circuit 32 days ago. They've hit the reset button so give him the benefit of the doubt. TANGLEWOOD JIMMY (9) is a genuine type who started a move a long way from home then kept going to get up for third over the mile here recently. Just can't draw a decent gate but will give his all and be thereabouts again. The lightly raced SILVER TEMPEST (4) failed over 1600m here last start after a first-up victory at Taree. Worth another chance dropping back to a more suitable journey. PORTOFINO (3) has thrived this prep since coming to the Mack Griffith yard. Shouldering big weights well and can chalk up the hat trick.
